title: Little Girl Undergoes 8 Heart Surgeries
transcript:
It's a true medical miracle.
That 4 year old Evelyn Otto is up and about,
moving around the hospital like any kid.
It is absolutely amazing how resilient Evelyn is.
She's a fighter, no doubt.
When Evelyn was born, she was diagnosed with a congenital heart defect.
And it came with plenty of obstacles.
After eight surgeries before the age of two,
little Evelyn is a true warrior.
Her doctor says over the years, as she grows,
she'll have to have more surgeries and live life on medications.
But there's hope as well.
She is one tough kid.
You know, there are limitations, but there's also great expectations that she's going to have a very full and wonderful life.
